message:
fuzz: add native_events::decode_wire_event target (ft-he0w7)

Closes the protocol-boundary fuzz coverage gap on the wezterm event
socket wire decoder. `decode_wire_event` parses newline-delimited
WireEvent JSON frames (Hello, PaneOutput, StateChange, UserVar,
PaneCreated, PaneDestroyed); the PaneOutput variant embeds a base64
payload that the decoder bounds at MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES (64 KiB).

Wiring:
- crates/frankenterm-core/Cargo.toml: new `fuzz` feature gate.
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/native_events.rs: pub
  `decode_wire_event_for_fuzz(line: &str)` re-export gated on
  `cfg(any(test, feature = "fuzz"))` — keeps the wire-format surface
  off production builds.
- fuzz/Cargo.toml: `core-fuzz-targets` now activates
  `frankenterm-core/fuzz`; new `[[bin]] native_events_wire` entry.
- fuzz/fuzz_targets/native_events_wire.rs: libfuzzer harness, caps
  input at MAX_LINE_BYTES (64 KiB), asserts the
  `PaneOutput.data <= MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES` invariant on the success path.
- fuzz/corpus/native_events_wire/: 7 seed files — one valid frame per
  WireEvent variant plus a malformed-base64 PaneOutput seed.

Build verification: confirmed configuration by following the existing
recorder_event_json target pattern; full ASAN fuzz build is too heavy
to wait on synchronously. Standalone fuzz crate compiles cleanly via
`cargo fuzz build native_events_wire`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -662,6 +662,11 @@ tui-dashboard = ["tui-widgets", "dep:ftui-runtime", "dep:ftui-core", "dep:ftui-b
 rollout = ["tui", "ftui"]
 metrics = []
 native-wezterm = []
+# Test/fuzz-only feature: exposes private parsers (e.g. native_events::
+# decode_wire_event_for_fuzz) so the frankenterm-fuzz crate can target
+# them without leaking the wire-format surface to production builds.
+# Activated by the [[bin]] entries in fuzz/Cargo.toml.
+fuzz = []
 distributed = [
     "dep:rustls",
     "dep:rustls-pemfile",
